visual_summary: A massive, fortified Martian city characterized by extreme verticality and defensive architecture. The urban layout is dense, defined by towering residential structures that are elevated to enhance security and mitigate assassination risks. The cityscape is enclosed by imposing stone or metal walls.
layout_notes: Dense urban layout featuring high-raised residences and massive defensive perimeter walls.
lighting: Urban Martian atmosphere; emphasis on verticality through light/shadow play on elevated structures.
constraints: Architecture must prioritize security and assassination prevention via elevation.
Must maintain a massive, walled scale.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific material composition of walls (uncertain if primarily stone or metal).
Exact density of the transit corridors within the dense layout.
